name: Impossible Garden Vegetable Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly grease a pie plate (10" x 11").
3. Cook broccoli until almost tender; drain thoroughly.
4. Mix broccoli, onion, and green pepper in the pie plate.
5. Beat remaining ingredients for 15 seconds in a blender, or 1 minute with a hand beater or whisk until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
7. Bake until golden brown and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean; about 35 - 40 minutes.
8. Let stand 5 minutes before cutting.
9. Garnish with tomato slices and parsley.
1 package (10 oz) frozen chopped broccoli (thawed) or cauliflower thawed and drained may be substituted for the fresh. Do NOT cook.
